summary: Fixed 5 tree rendering bugs: renderTree waves branch (T1194), orchestrate renderer registry (T1195), buildTreeNode position sort (T1196), computeWaves dead code fix (T1197), quiet mode connectors (T1198). 4 commits, 38 tests pass.
key_findings: build-tree-sort.test.ts used non-existent accessor.upsertTask — fixed to seedTasks(); all implementation changes were pre-staged in worktree, tests written to cover them; worktree verify needs CLEO_OWNER_OVERRIDE

summary: T1199: FlatTreeNode extended with priority/depends/blockedBy/ready fields; buildTreeNode accepts taskMap for O(1) dep status. T1200: blockerIndicator() helper + priority colors in renderTreeNodes. 2 commits, 33 new tests (18+15), 0 new failures.
key_findings: ANSI color codes disabled in vitest (no TTY) — color tests must assert symbol presence not escape sequences; worktree verify requires CLEO_OWNER_OVERRIDE as commits not yet on main; buildUpstreamTree also updated for FlatTreeNode consistency

T1202: Added EnrichedWaveTask interface with priority/depends/blockedBy/ready fields; sortWaveTasks sorts by priority DESC then open-dep count ASC then ID ASC; completedAt attached to completed waves; enrichTask uses live taskMap. T1201: Exported renderWaves(data,opts) with 4 modes — rich (ANSI with priority color + blocker indicators), json (passthrough), markdown (GFM ## headers + list items), quiet (waveNumber\ttaskId per line); renderTree delegates to renderWaves; 2 existing T1194 quiet mode tests updated to new waveNumber\t format. 20 core tests + 81 cleo renderer tests pass.

8e388fbcb feat(T1204): refactor CLI renderers to delegate to core formatters
key_findings: Agent claimed append but did not write — manifest entry backfilled by orchestrator; verified 2 commits + T1191 done in CLEO.

commits: 4975f8c342d0b1758a2071220af1ab818b6fd27e feat(T1205): add --with-deps flag to tree command for dependency overlay
key_findings: Added --with-deps overlay to cleo tree: dim dep-chain lines in rich mode, nested markdown list items, json unchanged, quiet omitted. New tree-context.ts singleton wires CLI flag to core FormatOpts.withDeps. 17 new tests; 66 total pass. biome ci + tsc clean.

summary: T1206: blocker chains integrated into tree view — coreTaskTree withBlockers param, FlatTreeNode.blockerChain+leafBlockers, FormatOpts.withBlockers, --blockers CLI flag, 90 tests pass

FormatOpts.withBlockers: rich=dim chain lines+cyan leaves, markdown=(leaf) annotation, json=passthrough, quiet=skip
--blockers CLI flag wired through TreeContext + dispatch params
24 new formatter tests; 90 total pass; biome ci clean
